title: Spuddzt! [Cobblemon]
description: Cobblemon Data Pack that adds a cute little potato that grows into a great big potato!
body:
This Datapack adds a line of Pokémon known as Spuddzt, Potatoid, and Voltuber!

The three are designed as a starter line, and their starter trio will likely be completed in the future.  They were also created because I feel that Grass/Electric is an underutilized type combination.

Spuddzt and its evolutions may be found in caves!  However, because they're starter Pokemon, they're gonna be hard to come by.  So if you want one on your team, be ready for some spelunking! (Or just use commands.  I won't tell anyone.)

To install, put the downloaded file in your Resource Pack folder and in your save's Data Pack folder.

Hope you enjoy!
